title.zh: Digital Realty Q1 租约和 backlog 验证 AI 数据中心落地需求
title.en: Digital Realty Q1 leasing and backlog validate AI data-center deployment demand

detail.zh: DLR Q1 2026 签下 $707M 年化 GAAP base rent bookings（100% share）和 $1.8B signed-but-not-commenced backlog，0-1MW + interconnection bookings 达 $98M、同比 +42%，并披露约 9GW 总 IT capacity。这个信号用于交叉验证：芯片/neocloud 的需求是否真的落到租约、互联和开发容量；如果 backlog commence 或电力/资本约束延迟，则上游订单可能领先真实部署太多。
detail.en: DLR signed $707M of annualized GAAP base-rent bookings at 100% share and ended Q1 2026 with $1.8B of signed-but-not-commenced backlog. 0-1MW plus interconnection bookings reached $98M, +42% YoY, and total IT capacity was about 9GW. This signal cross-checks whether chip/neocloud demand is landing in leases, interconnection and development capacity; if backlog commencement or power/capital constraints slip, upstream orders may be running too far ahead of physical deployment.

title.zh: Meta 筹建云业务，外售过剩 AI 算力
title.en: Meta building a cloud business to sell excess AI compute

detail.zh: 彭博 7 月 1 日报道 Meta 正筹建云业务、对外出售过剩 AI 算力，META 当日涨逾 6%；同日 AI 基建链大面积下跌：MU 跌逾 10%，SNDK/INTC/AMD 跌 6.9%–10.6%，CRWV 跌约 14%，NBIS 跌约 17%；7 月 2 日 SK 海力士领跌韩股。市场首次对「算力供给持续紧张」假设定价出裂缝。
detail.en: Bloomberg reported on Jul 1 that Meta is building a cloud business to sell excess AI compute; META rose 6%+ while the AI-infra chain sold off broadly: MU down 10%+, SNDK/INTC/AMD down 6.9%-10.6%, CRWV down ~14%, NBIS down ~17%; SK hynix led Korean declines on Jul 2. First market-wide crack priced into the compute-scarcity assumption.
